name: ai-learning-tools
description: Socratic guided learning skills for Codex: active learning, understanding checks, and conversation review.

interface.longDescription: Mindflint helps Codex guide learning through questions first, staged hints, understanding checks, and review of weak spots instead of immediately giving direct answers.
defaultPrompt: Use mindflint to guide me through this topic.
Use mindflint-check to check my understanding.
Use mindflint-review to review my weak spots from this conversation.
